expectations.text: Mentions 1024×1024 (or 1024px) as the correct canvas size for iOS
expectations.evidence: response.md: 'Set up your design at 1024 × 1024 px'

expectations.text: Advises separating the background from the foreground as distinct layers
expectations.evidence: response.md: 'Your background and your graphic mark each become their own layer'

expectations.text: Mentions deferring blur, shadow, or specular effects to Icon Composer (not baking them into source artwork)
expectations.evidence: response.md: 'Don't bake in blur, shadows, glows, or translucency — those are Liquid Glass properties you control in Icon Composer'

expectations.text: Explains how to customise the icon for dark mode in Icon Composer (e.g., fill variants, per-appearance settings)
expectations.evidence: response.md covers per-appearance fill variants in the Dark mode section

expectations.text: Mentions the Mono appearance and what to consider for tinted mode (e.g., setting primary element to white, contrast hierarchy)
expectations.evidence: response.md: Mono section explains setting primary element to white and contrast hierarchy
